| Time  | Topic                                                                  |
|-------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| :00   | [Welcome + Basic building blocks](workshop/02-building_blocks.qmd)      |
| :20   | [Your first application — inputs](workshop/03-first_app.qmd)            |
| :35   | [Your first application — outputs](workshop/03-first_app.qmd)           |
| :50   | ☕ Break                                                                 |
| 1:00  | [Shiny reactivity](workshop/04-reactivity.qmd)                          |
| 1:15  | [A more complex application](workshop/05-complex_app.qmd)               |
| 1:50  | ☕ Break                                                                 |
| 2:00  | [Introduction to Shiny modules](workshop/06-modules_intro.qmd)          |
| 2:15  | [Refactor your app into a module](workshop/07-modules_refactor.qmd)     |
| 2:30  | [Reuse your Shiny module](workshop/08-modules_compose.qmd)              |
| 2:50  | ☕ Break                                                                 |
| 3:00  | [Testing](workshop/09-testing.qmd) your shiny apps with playwright      |
| 3:30  | [Deploying your application](workshop/10-deploy.qmd)                    |
| 3:50  | [Wrap up](workshop/11-wrap_up.qmd) + Feedback Survey                    |
| 4:00  | Finish                                                                   |

<!-- TODO: Add SciPy 2026 start time so relative times above can be converted to clock times -->
